summary: beamz exfiltrates host and filesystem data to hardcoded Cloudflare Workers endpoint
details: index.js imports fs, os, https, and http, gathers host identifiers (os.hostname(), process.platform) and filesystem contents via fs.existsSync probes, and POSTs the collected data to the hardcoded endpoint https://tfer.jha-anurag2017.workers.dev via https.request. The destination is an anonymous Cloudflare Workers subdomain unrelated to any documented publisher infrastructure, and the package's behavior (system reconnaissance + exfiltration to an attacker-controlled URL) matches the active-attack fingerprint of a credential/host-info siphon. Installing or loading this package leaks installer machine metadata and filesystem state to a third-party endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
